---
params:
  county: "Salt Lake"
  data_dir: "data/remotes"
format:
  typst:
    margin:
      x: 0.4in
      y: 0.35in
    fontsize: 8pt
---

```{=typst}
#set page(flipped: true)
#set text(font: "Poppins", size: 8pt)
```

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(yaml)

settings    <- yaml::read_yaml("config/settings.yml")
report_data <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "report_data.rds"))
tract_maps  <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "tract_maps.rds"))

county_data <- dplyr::filter(report_data, county == params$county) |>
  dplyr::arrange(GEOID)

county_maps <- tract_maps[county_data$GEOID]
```

```{r}
#| label: save-maps
#| include: false
# Shared map_cache/ with summary — PNGs already written if summary ran first.
map_dir <- file.path(params$data_dir, "map_cache")
dir.create(map_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

map_paths <- purrr::imap_chr(county_maps, function(map, geoid) {
  path <- file.path(map_dir, paste0(geoid, ".png"))
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    filename = path,
    plot     = map,
    width    = settings$map_width_in,
    height   = settings$map_height_in,
    dpi      = 200,
    bg       = "white"
  )
  path
})
```

```{r}
#| label: pages
#| results: asis
#| echo: false

# ── Utility helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fmt_val <- function(x, digits = 1, suffix = "", big_mark = "") {
  if (length(x) == 0 || is.na(x)) return("—")
  if (is.numeric(x) && !is.finite(x)) return("—")
  rounded <- round(x, digits)
  if (digits == 0 && nchar(big_mark) > 0) {
    return(paste0(format(as.integer(rounded), big.mark = big_mark, scientific = FALSE), suffix))
  }
  paste0(format(rounded, scientific = FALSE), suffix)
}

col_val <- function(data, col) {
  if (col %in% names(data)) data[[col]] else NA_real_
}

oz_color <- function(cls) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("Likely to attract",   cls, ignore.case = TRUE) &
      !grepl("More|Less|Un",     cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "#2a7f46",
    grepl("More likely",         cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "#0072b5",
    grepl("Less likely",         cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "#e07b39",
    grepl("Unlikely|not likely", cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "#c0392b",
    TRUE ~ "#888888"
  )
}

oz_class_short <- function(cls) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("Likely to attract",   cls, ignore.case = TRUE) &
      !grepl("More|Less|Un",     cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Likely",
    grepl("More likely",         cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "More Likely",
    grepl("Less likely",         cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Less Likely",
    grepl("Unlikely|not likely", cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Unlikely",
    TRUE ~ "Unknown"
  )
}

# ── Typst content helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Full-width dark section header block.
panel_hdr <- function(title) {
  sprintf(
    '#block(width: 100%%, fill: rgb("#003b4f"), inset: (x: 5pt, y: 5pt))[#text(fill: white, weight: "bold", size: 7.5pt)[%s]]',
    title
  )
}

# Metric row: muted label (left) + semibold value (right).
mkv <- function(label, value) {
  sprintf(
    '#block(inset: (x: 5pt, y: 5.5pt))[#grid(columns: (1fr, auto))[#text(fill: rgb("#666666"), size: 7pt)[%s]][#text(size: 9pt, weight: "semibold")[%s]]]',
    label, value
  )
}

# Metric row with horizontal progress bar below the label/value.
mbar <- function(label, value, pct, bar_color = "#0072b5") {
  if (is.na(pct) || !is.finite(as.numeric(pct))) return(mkv(label, value))
  fp <- min(max(as.numeric(pct), 0), 100)
  sprintf(
    '#block(inset: (x: 5pt, y: 5.5pt))[#grid(columns: (1fr, auto))[#text(fill: rgb("#666666"), size: 7pt)[%s]][#text(size: 9pt, weight: "semibold")[%s]]#v(2pt)#block(width: 100%%, height: 3pt, fill: rgb("#e8f4f8"), radius: 1.5pt)[#block(width: %.1f%%, height: 3pt, fill: rgb("%s"), radius: 1.5pt)[]]]',
    label, value, fp, bar_color
  )
}

# Hero stat block for Zone 2 key-metric grid.
# bar_pct: NULL for no bar; numeric 0-100 for a progress bar.
hero_stat <- function(value_str, label, bar_pct = NULL, bar_color = "#0072b5") {
  bar_lines <- if (!is.null(bar_pct) && !is.na(bar_pct) && is.finite(as.numeric(bar_pct))) {
    fp <- min(max(as.numeric(bar_pct), 0), 100)
    sprintf(
      '#v(4pt)#block(width: 2.2in, height: 4pt, fill: rgb("#e8f4f8"), radius: 2pt)[#block(width: %.1f%%, height: 4pt, fill: rgb("%s"), radius: 2pt)[]]#v(3pt)',
      fp, bar_color
    )
  } else {
    "#v(6pt)"
  }
  paste0(
    sprintf('#text(size: 16pt, weight: "bold")[%s]', value_str),
    bar_lines,
    sprintf('\n#text(size: 6.5pt, fill: rgb("#666666"))[%s]', label)
  )
}

# Assemble a panel: header + rows vector joined, no wrapping brackets.
panel <- function(title, rows_vec) {
  paste0(c(panel_hdr(title), rows_vec), collapse = "\n")
}

# ── Per-tract page generator ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

tract_page <- function(tract, map_path, is_first) {
  g  <- function(col)                       col_val(tract, col)
  fv <- function(col, d = 1, s = "", m = "") fmt_val(g(col), d, s, m)

  county_str <- as.character(g("county"))
  geoid_str  <- as.character(g("GEOID"))

  oz_cls_raw <- if (is.na(g("oztoolclassification"))) NA_character_
                else as.character(g("oztoolclassification"))
  oz_badge   <- if (is.na(oz_cls_raw)) {
    '#text(fill: rgb("#888888"), size: 6.5pt)[—]'
  } else {
    sprintf(
      '#box(fill: rgb("%s"), radius: 2pt, inset: (x: 4pt, y: 2pt))[#text(fill: white, size: 6.5pt, weight: "bold")[%s]]',
      oz_color(oz_cls_raw),
      oz_class_short(oz_cls_raw)
    )
  }

  pvrty_str <- if (is.na(g("pvrty_r"))) "—" else as.character(g("pvrty_r"))
  unmpl_str <- if (is.na(g("unmpl_r"))) "—" else as.character(g("unmpl_r"))
  mfi_str   <- if (is.na(g("mfi")))     "—"
               else format(as.integer(g("mfi")), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE)

  pb <- if (!is_first) "#pagebreak()\n" else ""

  # ── Zone 2: hero stat blocks ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  h_pop   <- hero_stat(fv("pop",          0, m = ","), "Population")
  h_hh    <- hero_stat(fv("hh",           0, m = ","), "Households")
  h_acres <- hero_stat(fv("total_acres",  1),           "Total Acres")
  h_oz1   <- hero_stat(fv("oz1_pct",      1, "%"),      "OZ 1.0 %")
  h_ato   <- hero_stat(fv("ato_composite",        1),   "ATO Score (0–100)",
                       bar_pct   = g("ato_composite"),
                       bar_color = "#0072b5")
  h_muc   <- hero_stat(fv("wc_muc_pct",           1, "%"), "MUorC Coverage",
                       bar_pct   = g("wc_muc_pct"),
                       bar_color = "#2a7f46")
  h_sap   <- hero_stat(fv("sap_planned_hh_per_acre", 2), "SAP HH/Acre")
  h_eru   <- hero_stat(fv("eru_per_acre",            2), "ERU/Acre (2027–37)")

  # ── Zone 3: panel contents ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  centers_panel <- panel("Centers (% of Tract)", c(
    mbar("Metropolitan Ctr", fv("wc_pct_metropolitan_center", 1, "%"), g("wc_pct_metropolitan_center")),
    mbar("Urban Ctr",        fv("wc_pct_urban_center",        1, "%"), g("wc_pct_urban_center")),
    mbar("City Ctr",         fv("wc_pct_city_center",         1, "%"), g("wc_pct_city_center")),
    mbar("Neighborhood Ctr", fv("wc_pct_neighborhood_center", 1, "%"), g("wc_pct_neighborhood_center")),
    mbar("Employment Dist.", fv("wc_pct_employment_district", 1, "%"), g("wc_pct_employment_district")),
    mbar("Industrial Dist.", fv("wc_pct_industrial_district", 1, "%"), g("wc_pct_industrial_district")),
    mbar("Retail Dist.",     fv("wc_pct_retail_district",     1, "%"), g("wc_pct_retail_district"))
  ))

  housing_ui_panel <- panel("Housing & Demographics", c(
    mkv("Total Units",    fv("units_total",     0, m = ",")),
    mkv("Res. Acres",     fv("res_acres_total", 1)),
    mkv("SFD Acres",      fv("res_acres_sfd",   1)),
    mkv("MF/SFA Acres",   fv("res_acres_mf_sfa",1)),
    '#v(3pt)#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("#dddddd"), thickness: 0.5pt))#v(3pt)',
    mkv("Poverty Rate",         pvrty_str),
    mkv("Unemp. Rate",          unmpl_str),
    mkv("Median Family Income", mfi_str)
  ))

  transit_panel <- panel("Transit", c(
    mkv("Rail/BRT Stops",     fv("transit_stop_count", 0)),
    mkv("SAP Acres",          fv("sap_acres",          1)),
    mbar("SAP %",             fv("sap_pct",            1, "%"), g("sap_pct")),
    mkv("ATO Jobs (Transit)", fv("ato_jobtransit",     0, m = ",")),
    mkv("ATO HHs (Transit)",  fv("ato_hhtransit",      0, m = ","))
  ))

  auto_panel <- panel("Auto Access", c(
    mkv("Freeway Exits",   fv("freeway_exit_count", 0)),
    mkv("ATO Jobs (Auto)", fv("ato_jobauto",        0, m = ",")),
    mkv("ATO HHs (Auto)",  fv("ato_hhauto",         0, m = ","))
  ))

  growth_panel <- panel("Projected Growth 2027–37", c(
    mkv("HHs Added",  fv("hh_added",   0, m = ",")),
    mkv("Pop. Added", fv("pop_added",  0, m = ",")),
    mkv("Jobs Added", fv("jobs_added", 0, m = ",")),
    mkv("ERU Added",  fv("eru_added",  0, m = ",")),
    mkv("ERU/Acre",   fv("eru_per_acre",2))
  ))

  # ── Assemble Typst output ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  lines <- c(
    pb,

    # Header band
    sprintf(
      '#block(width: 100%%, fill: rgb("#003b4f"), inset: (x: 0.15in, y: 0.1in))[#grid(columns: (1fr, auto))[#text(fill: white, weight: "bold", size: 9pt)[%s County — Tract %s]][#align(right)[%s]]]',
      county_str, geoid_str, oz_badge
    ),
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("#7ec8e3"), thickness: 1.5pt))',
    "#v(0.04in)",

    # Zone 2: map (4.8in × 3.2in) | hero stats (2×4 grid)
    "#grid(columns: (4.8in, 1fr), rows: (3.2in,), gutter: 0.15in,",
    sprintf('  [#image("%s", width: 100%%)],', map_path),
    "  [#block(height: 100%)[#grid(",
    "    columns: (1fr, 1fr), rows: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr, 1fr),",
    "    gutter: 0.08in, align: center + horizon,",
    paste0("    [", h_pop,   "], [", h_hh,  "],"),
    paste0("    [", h_acres, "], [", h_oz1, "],"),
    paste0("    [", h_ato,   "], [", h_muc, "],"),
    paste0("    [", h_sap,   "], [", h_eru, "]"),
    "  )]]",
    ")",

    "#v(0.10in)",

    # Zone 3: 5 panels
    "#grid(columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr, 1fr, 1fr), gutter: 0.1in,",
    paste0("  [", centers_panel,    "],"),
    paste0("  [", housing_ui_panel, "],"),
    paste0("  [", transit_panel,    "],"),
    paste0("  [", auto_panel,       "],"),
    paste0("  [", growth_panel,     "]"),
    ")",

    "#v(0.04in)",
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("#dddddd"), thickness: 0.5pt))',
    "#v(1pt)",
    '#align(right)[#text(size: 5.5pt, fill: rgb("#888888"))[Sources: Federal OZ 2.0 eligibility, Urban Institute, WFRC/MAG regional data. Growth projections 2027–2037. ATO = Access to Opportunities.]]'
  )

  paste0(lines, collapse = "\n")
}

# ── Emit one raw Typst block per tract ───────────────────────────────────────
for (i in seq_len(nrow(county_data))) {
  tract <- county_data[i, ]
  geoid <- as.character(tract$GEOID)
  cat("``` {=typst}\n")
  cat(tract_page(tract, map_paths[[geoid]], i == 1))
  cat("\n```\n\n")
}
```
